ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status (e.g., accredited, not accredited) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Current total number of students */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Current total number of faculty members */,
  "website" TEXT /* Institution's website URL */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Institution's main phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., bachelor's, master's, Ph.D.) */,
  "program_duration" REAL /* Expected duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fees" REAL /* Annual tuition fees */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_requirements" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the program */,
  "program_website" TEXT /* Program-specific website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the student */,
  "international_student" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student is international */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  "expected_graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation */,
  "current_gpa" REAL /* Current grade point average */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Student's minor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid package */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the aid */,
  "aid_type" TEXT /* Type of aid (e.g., Pell Grant, subsidized Stafford Loan) */,
  "award_amount" REAL /* Amount of the award */,
  "aid_status" TEXT /* Status of the aid (e.g., awarded, pending, denied) */,
  "aid_description" TEXT /* Description of the aid package */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the aid was awarded */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the aid was disbursed */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the aid (e.g., federal, state, institutional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., graduation, employment) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "degree_awarded" TEXT /* Degree awarded upon graduation */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, further education) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title if employed */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary if employed */,
  "further_education_institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution for further education */,
  "further_education_program" TEXT /* Program for further education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "cohort_year" INTEGER /* Year the cohort entered the program */,
  "cohort_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the cohort */,
  "cohort_description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "cohort_leader" TEXT /* Name of the cohort leader or advisor */,
  "cohort_start_date" TEXT /* Date the cohort started */,
  "cohort_end_date" TEXT /* Date the cohort is expected to end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohorts_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "completion_rates" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion rate */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate for the cohort */,
  "completion_year" INTEGER /* Year the completion rate was measured */,
  "cohort_description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "completion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to measure completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_completion_rates_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persistence_rates" (
  "persistence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each persistence rate */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort */,
  "persistence_rate" REAL /* Persistence rate for the cohort */,
  "persistence_year" INTEGER /* Year the persistence rate was measured */,
  "cohort_description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "persistence_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to measure persistence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("persistence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persistence_rates_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclusion */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort */,
  "exclusion_type" TEXT /* Type of exclusion (e.g., deceased, permanently disabled) */,
  "exclusion_year" INTEGER /* Year the exclusion was measured */,
  "exclusion_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the exclusion */,
  "exclusion_effect" TEXT /* Impact of the exclusion on the cohort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exclusions_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics (e.g., graduation rates, employment rates) */,
  "analytics_year" INTEGER /* Year the analytics were measured */,
  "cohort_description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "analytics_description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics */,
  "analytics_source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)
